data.title: Team-review fixes for frac-192 branch: HouseBanner CORS double-fetch, tap-target compensation, preload priorities, GPU disposal gaps, banner masters out of public/

data.body: Cold review of 4a5cd21 against plan task_01KTT653EW8HSY3X71R3XF8KG0: PASS. Verified all 5 fixes: (1) HouseBanner now crossOrigin=anonymous, matching the CORS-mode index.html preloads; sync comments in all three path-list copies name each other. (2) Hit target compensated to 1/CENTER_REST_SCALE (effective world radius 1.0 at rest, ~1.056 hover); constants used by both the scale lerp and geometry args. (3) fetchpriority=high on hero AVIF preload, fetchpriority=low on all 8 banner preloads. (4) placeholderMaterials disposed in usePerFaceMaterials cleanup — identity verified stable (useMemo [] deps) and StrictMode confirmed absent in main.tsx, so no double-mount dispose-while-in-use hazard; usePerFaceOctahedronGeometry disposes via useEffect keyed on geometry (both radius-1 and 1.001 shells; radius args are literals so no mid-life disposal). (5) public/ fallback removed from SRC_DIRS, comments truthful (script does set exitCode=1 per MISSING source), masters in assets-src/banners/ match SOURCE_TO_OUTPUT filenames, no *.png or .DS_Store under public/images/banners/ (only webp + the 5 SVG banner files, which are plain- consumed and not preloaded — no CORS mismatch). Grepped src: no remaining consumers of the moved PNGs; HouseBanner is the only consumer of the preloaded webps. Validation: pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm test 7 failures = exact pre-existing baseline (buttons x2, footer x2, navigation x1, neighborhood x2), no new failures; pnpm build:banners succeeds from assets-src with byte-identical outputs (git status clean), 112.3 KB total vs 500 KB budget. No issues found; meets all acceptance criteria.
